items.name_en: 🆕 Chip Version.💕 Top-tier Original M12220 This Rosalie coin purse features the classic Monogram canvas from the Candy Factory collection, placing the brand mascot in a heart-shaped candy cane pattern, creating an exquisite gift for Vivienne fans. Open the Vivienne-shaped metal clasp to reveal multiple pockets for safely storing coins, bills, and cards.

items.name_cn:
New Crescent Bag🎉1BH222 Multi-functional🎉🎉
This Re-Nylon bag is crafted from recycled nylon, refined and versatile, blending archival aesthetics with practical contemporary style. The crescent silhouette features a detachable sporty shoulder strap and an elegant chain handle, offering versatile carrying options. Crossbody/Shoulder/Clutch/Handheld, it's perfect 😘😘 Ladies, get yours now 🎉🎉
30x13.5x6cm 🎉🎉🎉

items.name_en: New Dior ❤️❤️
items.name_cn:
New Dior ❤️❤️
This Lady Dior handbag is exquisitely designed with a spacious interior. Crafted from white lambskin, it features a woven grid quilting and a "D.I.O.R." charm, showcasing a fashionable and classic charm. The multi-compartment design is practical for various daily items. The chain is embellished with beads, making it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody.
Front "D.I.O.R." charm
Flip-top closure
1 exterior compartment
1 interior compartment
1 zip pocket
1 slip pocket
6 card slots
Chain embellished with beads
Made in Italy
Style: 3105
19.5 x 12.5 x 5 cm

items.name_en: New Dior Tote with Linen Embroidery
items.name_cn:
New Dior Tote with Linen Embroidery
Crafted from jute canvas, this Book Tote measures 36.5*28cm. Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this mainstay piece embodies Dior aesthetics. The medium size features a "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo on the front, showcasing Dior's signature craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder.
Front features "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Style: 8001

items.name_en: New Grey Embroidery 🦋🦋/Colorful Constellation
items.name_cn:
New Grey Embroidery 🦋🦋/Colorful Constellation
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Crafted from white fabric and meticulously embellished with the multicolor Rêve d'Infini pattern embroidery designed by artist Pietro Ruffo, it infuses a dreamy element into a classic design, reinterpreting the star symbol beloved by Christian Dior. It can hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring the CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.
Style: 8001
36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm
Front featuring CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
